Title: Login page loads with all required elements
Expected_Result: Login page opens. Visible: 'Login to your account' heading, Email input, Password input, Login button. Right side shows 'New User Signup!' section.

Title: Successful login with valid credentials
Steps: 1. Open '/login'  2. Enter valid email  3. Enter valid password  4. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: User is redirected to home page. Header shows 'Logged in as <username>'. 'Logout' and 'Delete Account' links appear.

Title: Login fails with invalid password
Steps: 1. Open '/login'  2. Enter valid email  3. Enter wrong password  4. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: Error message 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is displayed below the form. User remains on login page.

Title: Login fails with non-existent email
Steps: 1. Enter an email that has never been registered  2. Enter any password  3. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: Error message 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is displayed. No info leaked about which field is wrong.
Notes: Security: same message for both wrong-email and wrong-password to prevent user enumeration

Title: Login fails when both fields are empty
Steps: 1. Leave email empty  2. Leave password empty  3. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: HTML5 'Please fill out this field' tooltip appears on email field. Form is not submitted.

Title: Login fails when only email is provided
Steps: 1. Enter valid email  2. Leave password empty  3. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: HTML5 'Please fill out this field' tooltip appears on password field. Form is not submitted.

Title: Login fails with malformed email
Steps: 1. Enter malformed email  2. Enter any password  3. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: HTML5 'Please include an @ in the email address' tooltip appears. Form is not submitted.

Title: Password field masks input
Steps: 1. Click on password field  2. Type any characters
Expected_Result: Each character is rendered as a dot/asterisk. Plain text is not visible.

Title: Email field is case-insensitive
Steps: 1. Enter same email in UPPERCASE  2. Enter correct password  3. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: Login succeeds. User redirected to home page.

Title: Logout returns user to home as guest
Expected_Result: User is redirected to login page. Header no longer shows 'Logged in as'. 'Signup / Login' link is visible again.

Title: SQL injection attempt in email field is rejected
Steps: 1. Enter SQL injection string in email  2. Enter any password  3. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: Login fails with standard error message. No database error exposed. No unauthorized access granted.

Title: XSS attempt in email field is escaped
Steps: 1. Enter XSS string in email  2. Click 'Login'
Expected_Result: No JavaScript alert fires. Input is treated as plain text and email validation rejects it.
